query: What are the Q3 revenue figures for our top 3 customers, and how does their combined total compare to the same period last year?
Find all outstanding invoices from Acme Corp, calculate the total amount due, and identify which are past 30 days overdue.
Identify all clauses in the MSA with GlobalTech that include liability caps, and compare them to the standard template we use.
List all deals closed by the enterprise sales team in Q4, group them by region, and show total ARR per region.
Find all meetings this week with external stakeholders that have open action items from previous calls with those same companies.
Summarize the three most recent board meeting minutes and extract all decisions related to product roadmap changes.
Pull all employees hired in the last 90 days across EMEA offices and flag any whose onboarding checklists are incomplete.
Find all breaking API changes introduced in v2.x releases and cross-reference them with customer tickets filed in the same period.
Identify all data processing addendums signed with EU customers and flag any that predate GDPR and may need renegotiation.
Match all bank transactions from October against approved expense reports and identify any discrepancies over $500.
Find all engineering projects that are currently behind schedule, identify the blockers mentioned in the last standup notes, and list the project owners.
Compare the SLAs offered by our top three cloud vendors for storage services and flag any that fall below our internal minimum requirements.
Pull the feature comparison matrix for our Pro and Enterprise tiers, then identify which Enterprise features were requested most in support tickets last quarter.
List all enterprise accounts with NPS scores below 7 in the last survey, and find their most recent support escalations.
Show me all departments that exceeded their Q3 budget by more than 10%, and pull the line items that caused the overrun.
Find all jurisdictions where we operate and cross-reference them with the latest regulatory updates affecting our industry published in the last 6 months.
Prepare a briefing on GlobalTech: pull their recent support tickets, open renewals, and last three QBR notes.
Identify all customers using deprecated endpoints that will be removed in the v3.0 release, and pull their account owner contact details.
List all vendor contracts expiring in the next 60 days, their annual value, and whether the vendor has submitted a renewal proposal.
Produce a weekly sales digest: new deals closed, pipeline changes over $100K, and any accounts moved to churn risk this week.
